elements.original_description: A cartoon piggy bank with a frown, tilted to the side with coins spilling out onto a white surface. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a cartoon piggy bank with a sad frown, tilted to the side with several coins spilling out from its coin slot onto a pure white background. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.

elements.original_description: A stack of dollar bills with a red 'fee' stamp across them, placed on a white surface. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a neat stack of dollar bills with a bold red 'fee' stamp clearly marked across the top bill, placed on a pure white background. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
